name: create-dashboard-tool
prompt: Build a SaaS landing page for 'Marble' - a lightweight team knowledge base tool. Target audience: small engineering teams (5-50 people) who are tired of outdated wikis. Tone: calm, focused, slightly opinionated. Use React + plain CSS only. Produce complete, runnable code.
expected_output: A complete App.jsx + App.css with: non-default font, OKLCH-based colors, single accent color, intentional aesthetic direction, hover states on all interactive elements, no pure black/white, no purple gradient, no 3-equal-card layout, complete code with no stubs.

assertions.description: Inter is not the primary display font
Buttons or interactive elements have hover states
Colors defined using oklch() perceptual color space
No truncation, stubs, or ellipsis in output
Output includes both JSX component code and CSS
